title: Cobblemon Music Pack
description: Pokémon music in Minecraft! Now with Cobblemon Battle Music & MusicNotification compatibility!
body:
# Cobblemon Music Pack

Replaces Minecraft's music with Pokémon music, intended for use with [Cobblemon](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon) or other Pokémon-themed mods or packs. Can still be used in Vanilla too.

---

Includes [`musics.json`](https://github.com/KosmoMoustache/MusicNotification/blob/next/common/src/main/resources/assets/musicnotification/musics.json5) for [Music Notifications](https://modrinth.com/mod/music-notification/) support w/ included custom icons from [PKMNicons](https://www.deviantart.com/pkmnicons). Also utilizes Cobblemon's unused music flags to add some original battle tunes in your fights!

Works in 1.18 to 26.2 - You can also use the [VanillaBackport](https://modrinth.com/mod/vanillabackport) mod to add music from all newer versions if you're on an older version.

You may need to restart your game for Music Discs to display correct names & MusicNotification's Jukebox to update the meta.

**WARNING:** Tracks were not edited, so some songs will be louder than others.

You may use this pack in your modpack! However due to the size, you should link to this Modrinth page for the source (via `.mrpack` or other similar manifest files).

#### Identifiers

Each song was categorized into 3 specific types of fights based on the name:

- Wild: Wild Pokémon battle
- Trainer: NPC Trainer Battle
- Rival: PvP Battle

## Known Issues

- MusicNotification doesn't officially support 26.2 (yet) - [see here](https://github.com/KosmoMoustache/MusicNotification/pull/132).
    - Toasts will still appear when using VanillaBackport, but you can't play these songs from Jukebox yet.
